text:
There was once a girl named Alice. She lived on an isolated island in a deep forest. Alice loved reading. She collected books. She read them often.

One afternoon, as she sipped tea, a beautiful red bird landed by her plate. It squawked quietly. Alice smiled. She liked birds.

That night she dreamed they flew together. Weeks turned into months. They visited parks. They flew into cottonfields. They sang.

One sunrise Alice saw the bird again. It was gone. She searched and found a nest. She kept it.

Years passed. She had a library. They were her friends. They never flew away. They got bigger.

Alice's friends loved her. They would talk. She had stories. They said anything was possible.
